final_standard: All exhibits use one house grammar: warm paper, dark ink, sparse rules, direct labels, visible source/caveat line, and no decorative AI-glow language.
minimum_gate: Every final exhibit identifies one visual family and one reader job.
verification: Check assets_manifest.tsv, selected-100 matrix, and final page proofs for family/job fields.
failure_action: Return exhibit to design review until its job is explicit.

final_standard: Use a clean sans inside visuals; reserve serif texture for book layout, captions, and running prose.
minimum_gate: Primary SVG titles 34-44 px; section labels 22-28 px; body labels 17-22 px; source/caveat text 14-17 px.
verification: Parse SVG font-size declarations and inspect final PDF page images at target size.
failure_action: Rewrite labels or enlarge figure before final placement.

final_standard: Keep the I-0005 multi-hue palette but normalize names: ink #20242a, paper #f7f5ef, rule #d8d2c5, compute blue, signal green, heat red, brass, and restrained violet.
minimum_gate: No exhibit should be dominated by one accent hue unless the data semantics require it.
verification: Palette scan of SVG hex colors plus grayscale preview.
failure_action: Recolor to role-based accents before chart QA.

final_standard: Use clear print-surviving strokes: 2 px for subtle rules, 3 px for primary outlines/arrows, 4 px only for emphasis.
minimum_gate: No essential line below 1.5 px in SVG source.
verification: Regex stroke-width scan and PDF visual check.
failure_action: Increase stroke or simplify figure before render QA.

final_standard: Charts use direct labels, units, source ID, snapshot/access date, and one caveat sentence near the figure.
minimum_gate: No legend-only interpretation for high-risk rank, price, benchmark, energy, or model-family charts.
verification: Chart QA checks axis labels, source line, caveat line, and prohibited-claim note.
failure_action: Block final use until annotation contract is complete.

final_standard: Source-excerpt cards are evidence objects, not pull-quote posters: source band, paraphrase-first text, source metadata, and blocker footer.
minimum_gate: Direct quotes obey source quote limits; every card names source ID, page/section/date, and blocked claim.
verification: Compare card copy with data/source_excerpt_card_design_contract_i0189.tsv and claims.tsv.
failure_action: Use paraphrase fallback or remove the card from selection.

final_standard: Figure labels follow chapter-local numbering: Figure CH.N, with asset ID and source ID kept in production notes, not decorative title text.
minimum_gate: Every selected final row has planned chapter slot and asset ID; captions can be traced back to source/provenance.
verification: Join selected-100 matrix, caption QA, source-note QA, and final layout notes.
failure_action: Do not promote page spread without traceable figure ID.

final_standard: Charts must be readable in grayscale and in print; color cannot be the only meaning channel.
minimum_gate: Use label text, shape, dash, weight, or order to distinguish important categories.
verification: Grayscale preview plus color-count and label audit.
failure_action: Add patterns/direct labels or reduce categories.

final_standard: SVGs carry role="img", title, and desc metadata.
minimum_gate: All final SVG exhibits pass role/title/desc checks.
verification: Regex/XML scan before chart legibility QA.

final_standard: Screenshots, PDF renders, slides, and photos use restrained source frames: crop note, access date, rights note, and caption firewall nearby.
minimum_gate: No screenshot/photo is treated as decorative atmosphere or outcome evidence.
verification: Check I-0217 source-note QA and screenshot/photo QA rows.
failure_action: Replace with source card or diagram if provenance/crop is weak.

final_standard: Caption, source note, and blocker must be near the visual in the final spread, not buried in a back matter ledger.
minimum_gate: Every final page proof shows caption and source/caveat line within the same figure block.

final_standard: One figure should teach one thing. Dense ledger boards are allowed only when the narrative job is audit or comparison.
minimum_gate: Maximum of one dense board per spread unless the chapter is explicitly doing source/benchmark methodology.
verification: Manual spread review against rhythm board.
failure_action: Split board, move to appendix, or replace with a calmer source card.

final_standard: Private-use, source-screenshot, public-domain, CC, and original-SVG statuses must be visually distinguishable in production notes and captions.
minimum_gate: Caption never implies rights clearance when a row says private-use or rights-review-needed.
verification: Join source-note QA, manifest, and caption QA.
failure_action: Add rights cue or remove from public-facing layout.

final_standard: Style compliance is necessary but not sufficient; final acceptance requires PDF/page-image legibility, overflow, caption, and source-note proof.
minimum_gate: No selected-100 readiness claim may rely on style contract alone.
verification: Use I-0219/I-0220 and later full-book render QA.
